feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to register in MDG key mapping table
entry.content:
To link key codes registered in S/4HANA with key codes in peripheral systems, I would like to bulk register them in the MDG key mapping table using a CSV file.

The codes to be registered are item codes and business partner codes. In this case, I would like to know the mapping data structure of the input CSV file (what fields are required in the CSV file).

Next, we plan to create an add-on program that will register data in the MDG key mapping table using the ADD_MATCHING method of CL_MDG_ID_MATCHING_API_BS.

I would like to know what parameters are required when calling this class, since the values ​​for KeySchemaID and KeyAgencyID are managed internally by the system.

I need your help.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: MDG fiori does not open change request to block business partner when i click on block button
entry.content:
Hi team,

i am facing an issue in MDG fiori for manage business partner.

when i search a bp in mdg fiori, i select it and click on block button to the block the business partner.

ideally it to should open corresponding blocking standard CR automatically in change mode but it does not.

we are facing this issue only for a few group of users not for everyone. 

Any suggestion on how to solve this.

Thanks.

entry.title: Modify Data in create supplier application in MDG
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to enhance standard SAP MDG application by calling a custom FPM on click of a button on Create supplier page to populate some data on a custom FPM. User will select a record from the custom popup and I need to pass data into Name and address field to standard one by overwriting programmatically the one which manually entered.

I need to know how to pass data from custom FPM to standard create customer screen/application. 

Steps

 

 

 On click of supplier button I am calling a custom FPM

Custom FPM screen populated


Now I have to select a record from this popup and pass it to standard fields alike name, address, city

entry.title: Call derivations on custom event in sap mdg
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to trigger an api call on click of a button based on address data and name enter for BP creation in SAP MDG.
Derive the data from API and update the address and Name data in BP creation.

How to call the retrieve data by triggering the derivation badi on click of a button or event or any suggested approach ?

Thanks
Vishal

entry.title: Auto extend plant to a material SAP MDG
entry.content:
My requirement is to auto extend a plant to a material CR

Background 

I am creating a follow-up cr where I want to auto add new plants when the CR is opened

i have written the code in system method caller badi as I am creating follow up cr by code

I have use Governance API but new plants are not getting added and there is no error as well.

And if I am making changes to existing data it is working fine but when I am trying to add new plant data it is not working

 

I tried to modify ct_data as well of plant feeder class but encountering same issue

please suggest

entry.title: Is it possible to call enrichment on custom button instead of check in MDG
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Is this possible to call enrichment spot on click of a custom button instead of check button while creating BP.

Thanks

entry.title: Change request not created on API ProductMDMBulkReplicateRequest_In
entry.content:
Dear All

In view of our development task,  we are using SOAP API ProductMDMBulkReplicateRequest_In to get the material data from external system(non SAP).

First BC set MDGM_MDG_MATERIAL_CR_SOAP_09 activated and CR types MATL0I , MATL0U created, also decision tables configured.   Next SOAMANAGER and DRFIMG configured. 

Then executed sample payload and able to update the material fields and can see the ProductMDMBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out XML in SXI_MONITOR but   change request not created.

 

Debugged the API and see that go_mdg_mm_2_sta not bound, seems this is the reason for CR not created.

 

Am i missing anything here?  If so , could some one provide your inputs please.

 

regards

Chandra Kishore.

entry.title: SAP MDG Service Mapping Tools (SMT)
entry.content:
SAP MDG Service Mapping Tools (SMT)The service mapping tools (SMT) in SAP master data governance (MDG) is a framework use to define and manage data mapping between.

 

  1. Staging area structure
  2. Active area table
  3. Remote system or interface

Use :

  1. Replication or consolidation data between stating and active area.
  2. Map internal data structure to external system.
  3. Handle field name or mismatches between system.

 

 Configuration path :

Master Data Governance -> Classic Mode in SAP MDG -> Central Governance -> General Settings -> Data Modeling -> Generate Data Model-Specific Structure

SMT Mapping from Active Area :  Active area to staging area

SMT Mapping to Active Area: Staging area to active area

  1. Creating New field in ZAB_LFA1 structure : Industry Key (BRSCH)

  1. Creating Mapping for new field i.e. Industry Key :

Path: SMT-> Transformation Workbench -> Create and Edit Mappings

 

  • Source Structure: ZAB_LFA1
     This is a custom structure you created in Step 1 for supplier master data.
  • Target Structure: LFA1
     This is the standard SAP Vendor Master Table in ECC/S4HANA.
  • Mapping Step: ZMAP_HEADER
    This defines how fields from ZAB_LFA1 map to fields in LFA1.
  1. Need to map field one by one Source system to Target system

 

  • Select Source Structure (ZAB_LFA1) and Target Structure (LFA1).
  • For each field:
    1. Click on the source field (e.g., SUPPLIER_NO).
    2. Click on the target field (e.g., LIFNR)
    3. Click Map.

Repeat for all fields listed above.

Save and activate the mapping.

  1. Need to check Mapping:

Path: Transformation Workbench -> Check Customizing

 

  • check the mapping in SAP MDG and ensure there are no errors, you need to use the Transformation Workbench. Here’s the proper procedure
  1. If need we can add logic for source system to target system: (custom program)

Create custom program we will use T code SE38 here we will use standard class by SAP  CL_SMT_ENGINE.

Constructor and Executor methods in the Transformation Workbench

  • Methods Constructor:

Following Parameter are use.

  • Methods Workbench:

Following Parameter are use.

Source:

Target:

SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: Reasigning material class 001 data for characteristic from class to class
entry.content:
Hello,

My customer uses many class assigned to material classification 001:

For that we have custom program that is printing the certificate data. Now we would like to exclude some of the characteristic from printing and we have created new class - NO_PRINT. The task is to reassign the characteristic from current ones to NO_PRINT, but without loosing the data in material masterdata. Is there a way to do it? We have over 500 materials that would be affected.

Thanks.

entry.title: SAP MDG relationship partner id int numer
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m working in SAP MDG and ran into a situation with the Relationship field. When I enter a Partner ID, instead of seeing the numeric value I expect, the field displays “Int. Num.”.

entry.title: Search Term should be mandatory in CR
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m trying to make the “Search Term” field mandatory in a Change Request (CR) in SAP MDG. I’ve ticked the Required checkbox in the field properties, but the field is still not behaving as mandatory when creating a CR.  For reference, this is the SPRO path I followed to set the field as required:

Cross-Application Components->SAP Business Partner->Business Partner->Basic Settings->Field Groupings->Configure Field Attributes per BP Role

My goal here is that the Search Term1 field should be mandatory when the role is FLVN01.

entry.title: SAP MDG – Partner ID field shows “Int Number” instead of selected ID
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am working as an SAP MDG technical consultant and I am facing a strange behavior in an MDG UI (FPM).

In a relationship assignment screen, I have a Partner ID field with a search help.
From the search help, I select a valid partner (numeric BP ID). However, after selection, the Partner ID field is filled with the text “Int. Numer” instead of the actual partner number.

i mentioned in screenshot

i need your support

entry.title: Withholding Tax data getting deleted
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

We have observed that when performing mass updates at the company code level—such as changes to payment methods, payment terms, or remittance email—the existing withholding tax details for all  company codes for that vendors are being removed. 

Please help me to understand this and what are steps I need to take to rectify this

entry.title: Web service deletion in sproxy
entry.content:
From MDG, we were updating the standard SOAP service - BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In with custom attribute. But accidentally the inbound service got deleted and it impacted the SOAP BP outbound service as well.

As per SAP suggestion, we restored the deleted services from quality back to development successfully.

But now, we are still unable to execute any outbound or inbound BP service, as it is giving transformation /1SAI/SAEE105C7A25604C0F2D88F syntax error and SAP is unable to generate the payload.

this transformations are runtime generated but now in our dev system it is not available.

Steps taken :

  1. Individually tried to activate all data dictionary objects, classes, proxy
  2. Tried to copy transformation from quality to dev but still it is failing.

    Please let me know, if you could help us.

entry.title: SAP MDG standard Field mandatory for change/create request tab
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently facing an issue in the MDG portal.

As in the attached image, the Description field is already by default mandatory. I want to make the "Reason" field mandatory as well. Please guide how to do it.

Currently I am on S/4HANA

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

SAP Master Data Governance 
@chahoud 
@SAPSupport

entry.title: MDG :How to hide custom list UIBB based on company code in customer
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have created a custom list UIBB under 'ERP Customer' tab(Customer governance app).  I want to hide/unhide complete custom list section based on company code. How to achieve it. I tried creating post method for IF_FPM_OVP_CONF_EXIT~OVERRIDE_EVENT_OVP of class CL_BS_BP_OVP_ASSIST, but it is not working.

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud 2602 / Mass Maintenance of Sales Area Texts and Email Notes
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
i have to following two questions regarding the mass maintenance of sales Area Texts and Email Notes and i have combined them because they are related to the same tools:

1. My first questions is about the ability to add a new sales text to existing business partners.
My current workflow is the following:
I start by exporting the data for the relevant business partners including the table KNVV_STXL. In a second step i added a new row with the new text and used the action code I (Insert). The issue i faced is, if I try to import the file in the App F6553A i get a warning that "the Action Code I is not permitted for the table KNVV_STXL".

My question is, is there a another action code that can achieve this ? If not, what is an other way to add Sales Texts to business partners in mass ?

2. The second issue is related to the mass maintenance of email notes. In my research i have so far found out, that these notes are saved in the table ADRT and proably in the field AD_REMARK2. But from what i have seen so far, i am not able to export this table within the app Export Master data - business partners (F6551A). Therefore im also not sure if its possible to insert a new entry for this table with the MDG tools.

My question is, is this table and field out of scope for the MDG processes ? If so, is there an alternative way to maintain it in mass ?

Thank you for all responses
Best regards Lukas

entry.title: Derivation for Direct Activation Mass Consolidation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a derivation requirement in SAP MDG Mass Processing/Consolidation. The process template we’re using performs direct activation with no Change Request (CR) type involved, so we can’t use the USMD_SSW_RULE BAdI in this scenario. We need an alternative class or BAdI that supports derivations for direct activation.

entry.title: API to Read Change Entity Type in Dynamic BADI
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement for Dynamic Agent in the CR update scenario. We need to determine whether the Company Code and/or Sales-level entity data has changed.

  • If only Company Code and/or Sales-level data is changed, the workflow should proceed with auto-approval.
  • If any General-level data changes along with Company Code/Sales, the workflow should route for one-step approval.

Need a logic or API to read change entity type because in read change document we only getting fieldname.

entry.title: how to trigger handler class read method in RAP OData V4 Web API?
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

Good day.

Well, I have a requirement, existing material data coming from third party system to CPI to S/4 HANA MDG and need to create change request and approve it.

So created a RAP service, Table , CDS view , service definition with binding type OData V4 Web API along with behavior definition/implementation In the handler class, defined the methods modify and read. I just want to see if read method is called and data filled. So i would like to know how i can execute/debug the handler class read method.

How can i do the GET call using GW client?

Service URL :  /sap/opu/odata4/sap/xxx_xx_xxx_sb/srvd_a2x/sap/xxxx_xx_xxxx_s/0001/

xxx_xx_xxx_sb -  Service binding         xxxx_xx_xxxx_s  - Service definition

 

 

 

regards

Chandra Kishore.
